decisions.rationale: Valid polish gap: bTISS/bTIUP bubble shells use Tailwind radius/bg with DS-01 CSS variables rather than a named Group_* style_ref. AC-3 scopes typography and badge colors through DS-01 classes only — bubble shell style_refs are implicit and not cited in decompose ACs or ui_refs. criteria_audit AC-3 and ui_evidence for bTISS/bTIUP both pass; colors already resolve via --color_primary_default / --color_aiRNbAaxgr_default tokens so token-change drift is mitigated. DS-06 composes these primitives without needing shell style_ref extraction first; defer bubble shell class extraction to a later DS polish wave.

Decompose AC-1 explicitly requires bTIRh/bTIRi to use Text_body_; implementation applies bubbleStyle('Text_body_') with text-lg font-semibold as presentation layering to match Bubble title emphasis. IR element_type is Text (not a named Text_heading_* ui_ref in ACs); review ui_evidence passes bTIRh and criteria_audit AC-1 passes. Switching to a heading style_ref would contradict written AC-1 without blocking DS-06 depends_on.

Decompose partitions bTIRW: DS-05 delivers header/messages library primitives; DS-06 owns ChatReusable shell composition and ChatWindow.tsx wiring (listed in DS-06 target_files). DS-06 depends_on DS-05 and is at implement_gate write with 0% coverage — integration is explicitly the next item. Exports from frontend/src/components/chat/index.ts satisfy DS-06 depends_on without mounting in ChatWindow now.

IR binds bTIUU text via parent custom.chatmessage data; DS-05 ChatMessage type and AC-2 require preserving bTIUU element with Text_disclaimer_ styling and alignment only — no AC mandates per-message disclaimer_text prop. Static CHAT_ASSISTANT_DISCLAIMER is an acceptable composable default for frontend-only primitives; defer optional disclaimer_text on ChatMessage to DS-06 shell integration or CHAT-05 live chatmessage API wiring when parent_data bindings are available.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs pass. C-1 deferred: bubble shell style_ref polish not in AC-3 scope; token vars mitigate drift. C-2 accepted: AC-1 mandates Text_body_ on bTIRh. C-3 deferred to DS-06: ChatWindow/ChatReusable shell wiring. C-4 deferred to DS-06/CHAT-05: per-message disclaimer binding when live data integrates.
